source_note: Chinese hot-topic candidates are collected from public trend pages; English wording is matched to supplied official English headlines when possible, otherwise suggested neutrally.

topics.chinese_topic: 塔克拉玛干沙漠边缘地带现洪水

topics.why_hot: Extreme weather event in a typically arid region sparks curiosity and concern about climate change.
topics.share_angle: Explain the science behind rare desert flooding and its implications for climate patterns.

topics.why_hot: Severe weather warnings directly affect public safety and daily life across large regions.
topics.share_angle: Break down the warning system and offer practical safety tips during extreme rainfall.

topics.share_angle: Explain the cultural and meteorological significance of plum rain season and share tips.
